text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting this year, Special Week takes on the
challenges of being a senior-year racer. We're
going to our first shrine visit of the year when...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh! S-sorry! I was just thinking to myself.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
This is where everyone hangs their hopes and
wishes for the year, right?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Like "I'm gonna get first place!" or "I'm winning
the Derby!"

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Or even, "I don't want to lose to my rivals."

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
When a racer has someone they don't wanna lose
against, it's like a fire starts raging deep inside of
them.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I wanna win. In my races and against my
rivals.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I wanna win with everything I've got.
choice_data_list: We'll win. We'll do whatever it takes.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Oh! While we're here, why don't we write
down our hopes too?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: In other words, pick a goal for me this year!
choice_data_list: To learn a variety of skills!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oooh, I see! My strength, huh? All righty!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Then let's eat at every food stall here today!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: My mom used to say that power comes from food!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
We'll start with some amazake, and then we'll
have yakisoba and sweet steamed buns! Oh, and
also some takoyaki...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, an enthusiastic Special Week and I
fill up our bellies.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hmm... Elevate my abilities, huh?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You got it! All righty, I'll start out with ten sprints
up and down the stairs!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Whoops! That was a close one. It's pretty
dangerous with so many people here right now.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hum... I guess I'll start tonight, then! I'm counting
on your wise leadership!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the year gets off to a quick start,
courtesy of some training with a highly-motivated
Special Week.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Skills, huh? Skills... Skills...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh! Yeah, I've got skills! Check this out!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Special Week Rolling Attaaack!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...How was that?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
It's a combination of a pro-wrestling move that El
taught me, along with my name...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As we depart the shrine, I explain to her that her
display of wrestling prowess wasn't quite exactly
what I had in mind.
